entities.name: NONLEGUME N2-FIXING SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems where non-leguminous plants associate with nitrogen-fixing bacteria to obtain nitrogen

entities.name: BACTERIAL ASSOCIATIONS
entities.description: Symbiotic or associative relationships between bacteria and plants

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A non-legume cereal crop involved in bacterial associations for nitrogen fixation

entities.name: SUGARCANE
entities.description: A non-legume grass crop involved in bacterial associations for nitrogen fixation

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A non-legume cereal crop involved in bacterial associations for nitrogen fixation

entities.name: MILLETS
entities.description: Non-legume cereal crops involved in bacterial associations for nitrogen fixation

entities.name: AZOSPIRILLUM
entities.description: A genus of nitrogen-fixing bacteria often found in associative systems

entities.name: NITROGEN FIXATION
entities.description: The biological process of converting atmospheric nitrogen into ammonia

entities.name: RHIZOCOENOSES
entities.description: The community of microorganisms that inhabit the rhizosphere of a plant

entities.name: DIAZOTROPHS
entities.description: Microorganisms capable of fixing atmospheric nitrogen

entities.name: INOCULATION
entities.description: The process of introducing beneficial microorganisms into a plant or soil to improve nitrogen fixation

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: The science of changing the traits of plants to improve their ability to associate with nitrogen-fixing bacteria
